featured.title: THE GATES OPEN
featured.body: The Tower stands open at last. What you carry into it is yours to lose — heroes die, and their deaths are not undone. But legacies endure, and the climb remembers every name. Climb well.

notices.title: THE GATES OPEN
notices.desc: The playtest begins — the Tower takes its first climbers

notices.title: KNOWN CRACKS IN THE STONE
notices.desc: Issues the keepers are already mending

notices.title: HOW TO REPORT A HAUNTING
notices.desc: Found a bug? Send word through the mail raven
